summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte (offset 0x19) must equal 3 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) so the bKGD out-of-place check takes the true side.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type byte at file offset 0x19 must hold the literal value 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE), which makes png_ptr->color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE true at L1932.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every cmplog winner-resolving seed carries 08 03 at offsets 0x18-0x19; the byte diff shows offset 0x0019 is 03 in all 34 winner samples, and W takes L1932 with T=55 F=0.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking naive seeds carry color_type 06/04/00 at offset 0x19 (06x5 04x5 00x4); they never set 0x03, so L1932 stays false (T=0 F=20) and the branch is blocked.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog logs the color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE comparison operands into the CmpLogObserver buffer; I2SRandReplace then substitutes the constant 3 into the input byte where the live color_type value appears, directly flipping the equality without random search.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must reach the exact value 3; value_profile is rewarded for each input that gets the compared operand closer to the constant.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the branch in 8/10 trials and the winner color_type byte at 0x0019 is concentrated on 03 (03x34), the matching constant.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive losers stall on color_type values 06/04/00 at 0x0019 with no distance feedback, so they cannot iteratively close toward 3 and remain blocked (resolved=1/10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records the operand-distance bucket for the color_type == 3 comparison; a near-value (e.g. 2 or 4) that is closer to 3 than any prior input adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is retained, giving a Hamming/distance gradient that ratchets the byte to exactly 3.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 3 so the bKGD handler reaches the palette-out-of-place body; the same edge is newly rewarded under a distinct call context.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: naive_ctx resolves 10/10 and its winner-resolving seeds (stored under naive_ctx) carry 08 03 at 0x18-0x19, taking the W-only out-of-place body at L1934-L1938.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive (no context indexing) keeps color_type at 06/04/00, never produces 0x03, and blocks the branch in 9/10 trials with avg duration 21.60h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: naive_ctx's CtxHook folds the caller chain into the edge-map index, so reaching the bKGD comparison via a new call context counts as new coverage; this preserves intermediate inputs that naive discards, retaining more parent material whose havoc mutation eventually lands color_type=3 at offset 0x19.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch is the true side of color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE at L1932.
Winner inputs take L1932 true while losers take it false.
All winner samples set the color_type byte at offset 0x19 to 03 while losers set 06/04/00.
cmplog winning seeds carry 08 03 at offsets 0x18-0x19.
A loser-blocking naive seed carries 08 06 at offsets 0x18-0x19 (color_type 6).
cmplog intercepts integer CMPs and I2SRandReplace substitutes one operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile preserves inputs that bring CMP operands closer to matching via a distance bucket.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: naive_ctx folds the call context into the edge-map index so the same edge under a new context is new coverage.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
folds it into the edge-map index, so the same basic-block edge is
recorded at different map slots depending on the call path that
reached it.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog wins 10/10 over naive's 1/10, value_profile 8/10, naive_ctx 10/10.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3996 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 14ddd5a497528d88` and observed 1 I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -) at depth 3 of the 4-level ancestor chain; the tool's trailing 'I2S-floor signal' line confirmed one dash row at depth 3, lower-bound evidence of an I2SRandReplace find in the cmplog winner's lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type == 3 in which cmplog resolves no faster than naive (no I2S advantage), or in which winners reach the branch with color_type bytes other than 0x03, would refute the offset-0x19==3 feature hypothesis.

weakest_evidence_point: The value_profile and naive_ctx attributions are inferred from mechanism descriptions and the shared 0x19==3 byte requirement; no value_profile/naive_ctx lineage was run to confirm those techniques (not I2S leakage) drove their wins.
